name: French Meatball Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Add rice to 1 cup of water. Boil for 5 minutes, then drain well.
2. Blend rice, ground beef, egg, onion, garlic, parsley, and nutmeg. Form into small meatballs.
3. Add wine to the broth; bring to a boil.
4. Drop meatballs into the hot broth one at a time. Bring back to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Add salt and pepper. Microwave: Repeat steps 1-5.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 MEAT EXCHANGE + 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE
CAL: 71
